decision.summary: Hold the resolved 67k daily Yes position into settlement and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The only open BTC position, `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` on `Yes`, is already at 100% with BTC spot at 67676.0, so under the playbook take-profit exception it can be left to resolve naturally. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summaries still point to a macro-bearish structure after a rebound/squeeze, and Binance confirms that squeeze has already extended into the 67k-68k area. No new trade is warranted because the daily slot is already occupied, the nearest upside market for March 30 (`reach 68k`) is above the hard 85% cap, and no weekly or monthly BTC markets are provided here. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
